title: Skill Graph Program: Skill Inventory Extraction
description: Extract atomic skill and worked-example candidates from IM1, IM2, IM3, and AP Precalculus curriculum source artifacts into validated knowledge-space.v1 draft node inventories.
deviation_notes: Parser needed section-targeted table extraction (not first-table-wins) due to budget tables appearing before instruction tables. IM2 modules use 'Unit' not 'Module' H1 headings — parser updated for lenient matching. PreCalc skill extraction deferred to T12 rollout — lesson format lacks explicit objective headings.
